name: Jerry Lee Lewis

acts.description: Married his 13-year-old first cousin Myra Gale Brown in 1957 while still married to his previous wife; openly admitted it

behavior_summary: Married 13-year-old first cousin Myra Gale Brown in 1957, bigamously. Career was briefly destroyed when British press exposed it. He was unapologetic. She was his third wife.

art.summary: Proto-rock and roll wild man whose piano style was genuinely electrifying and influential on every subsequent rock pianist.

verdict.blurb: Married his 13-year-old cousin while still married to someone else, told the British press about it without apology, and had the audacity to call himself The Killer. She was 13.
